title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: THREE RIVERS DENTAL CLINIC COOS BAY DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric and general dental services, including cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, root canals, treatment planning, and extractions. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Enrolled members of federally recognized Indian Tribes Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm (541) 888-6433 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-6433 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Dental Prosthodontics * Native American Community Endodontics * Native American Community General Dentistry * Native American Community Pediatric Dentistry * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
